query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, p.id as profileId, p.teamId, t.name as teamName
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN agent_teams t ON t.id = p.teamId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Dupreez%' OR u.name LIKE '%dupreez%' OR u.name LIKE '%Du Preez%'
ORDER BY u.name;
